MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Raffi Kassabian, Esq., of Bezdik Kassab Law Group. Tel:626.499.6998 for Plaintiff
Horatio Mihet, Esq., of Liberty counsel Tel: 4077660164 for defendant
Court Reporter: Justus Balentine CSR: 13859 Tel: phone 714-471 2597 email: justusbalentinecsr@gmail.com (via Zoom Conference)

A hearing is required. The matter was heard and discussed. Upon conclusion of the proceedings rules as follows:

1 - DEFENDANT JEWS FOR JESUS MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT The Court denies Defendant's Special Motion to Strike the Complaint.

Counsel Raffi Kassabian to prepare the proposed order and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang;Court Reporter: Justus Balentine CSR: 13859 Tel: phone 714-471 2597 email: justusbalentinecsr@gmail.com. Reported. (302/HEK)

Matter not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling.
